chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1453 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 22-05-2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Dayo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider „Ada‟ Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah Advocate files power on behalf of SEPCO, which is taken on record. Petitioner is ex-employee of SEPCO, he worked as Lineman. While performing his duty he got electric shock in the year 2011 and became incapacitated as his right arm was amputated. He has been running from pillar to post since then to get his son appointed on son quota as per policy envisaged in office order No.AD(E-II.A)07.781/PR/Chairman/21812 dated 08.04.2004. Learned DAG has confirmed existence of such policy in SEPCO and states that case of petitioner‟s son comes in category (b) which reads as, “a child of employee who became disable due to electric shock of injury causing disability, while performing official duty”. This policy has not been disputed by learned counsel for the SEPCO either and he submits that in fact the case of petition‟s son for appointment is already under consideration. We therefore while disposing of this petition direct the respondents No.3 and 4 to implement the policy as above and appoint the son of the petitioner within a period of two months as suggested by counsel of SEPCO, under intimation to this court. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
